text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 
53 
RPTD_GAP_DSCNT_NUM 
LABEL: 
Gap Discount Amount 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the amount of the discount provided by the drug’s manufacturer under the 
Medicare Coverage Gap Discount Program, as calculated by CMS based on data reported in the PDE. 
SHORT NAME: GAPDSCNT 
LONG NAME: RPTD_GAP_DSCNT_NUM 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
13 
SOURCE: 
PDE 
VALUES:
